human_actions_pending.action: Verify Railway deploy looks correct in browser
human_actions_pending.context: Two large commits pushed (d101b81, c7be343). Railway auto-deploys from master. Worker pages should now show paper/ink theme.

decisions.decision: layout-shell CSS class approach for outer protected layout background
decisions.rationale: Admin routes (no PaperThemeMount) keep bg-steel-900 default. Worker routes get body[data-theme=paper] .layout-shell override in blueprint-theme.css. Avoids creating admin layout wrappers.

decisions.decision: HazardsTab/ToolsTab pull from sections by render_family + title keywords, not Puck layout_data JSON parsing
decisions.rationale: layout_data is raw Puck JSON — complex to parse reliably. section.content plain text + sop.applicable_equipment + sop_steps.required_tools/warning/caution cover real data for now.

decisions.decision: WalkthroughTab already has safety gate + submit wired (from fecd2ae). Wave 3 is about inline evidence capture per step.
decisions.rationale: Submit flow uses SHA-256 content hash, useCompletionStore Dexie restore, flushPhotoQueue on reconnect. All wired. Missing: photo/voice/measure capture buttons inside ImmersiveStepCard body.

next_action: Start walkthrough Wave 3: add evidence capture grid (photo/voice/measure buttons) inside ImmersiveStepCard body, gate bar above footer when step has ack-required blocks, and ensure NEXT is disabled until gate satisfied. Read DEPRECATED-WALKTHROUGH.md first.
context_notes: Phase 12.5 blueprint redesign is substantially complete visually. All worker-facing pages (sops, activity, profile, completion detail) are in paper/ink. All components that rendered inside paper pages have been reskinned. Overview/Hazards/Tools tabs have real implementations. Flow tab already had a real SVG graph implementation. The remaining work is interactivity inside the walkthrough — the core worker completion UX.
